allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const [b,h]=s.split\('HTTP:'\);console.log\('HTTP',h\);try{const d=JSON.parse\(b\);if\(d.error\){console.log\('ERR',d.error.status,d.error.message\);return;}const x=d.data;if\(!x\){console.log\('data is null \(single type maybe unpublished\)'\);return;}console.log\('keys:',Object.keys\(x\).join\(', '\)\);console.log\('title:',JSON.stringify\(x.title\),'| subtitle:',JSON.stringify\(x.subtitle\)\);console.log\('heroImage:',x.heroImage?\('YES '+x.heroImage.width+'x'+x.heroImage.height\):'null'\);console.log\('intro is blocks:',Array.isArray\(x.intro\),'| len:',\(x.intro||[]\).length\);console.log\('whyChooseMe type:',typeof x.whyChooseMe,'| value:',JSON.stringify\(x.whyChooseMe\)\);console.log\('primaryCta:',JSON.stringify\(x.primaryCta\)\);console.log\('contactLinks:',\(x.contactLinks||[]\).length\);console.log\('featuredTours:',\(x.featuredTours||[]\).length,\(x.featuredTours||[]\).map\(t=>t.slug\).join\(','\)\);console.log\('seo:',x.seo?x.seo.metaTitle:'null'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse fail',b.slice\(0,300\)\);}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const [b,h]=s.split\('HTTP:'\);console.log\('HTTP',h\);try{const d=JSON.parse\(b\);if\(d.error\){console.log\('ERR',d.error.status,d.error.message\);return;}const t=d.data[0];if\(!t\){console.log\('no match'\);return;}console.log\('keys:',Object.keys\(t\).join\(', '\)\);console.log\('description is blocks:',Array.isArray\(t.description\),'len',\(t.description||[]\).length\);console.log\('duration:',JSON.stringify\(t.duration\),'| meetingPoint:',JSON.stringify\(t.meetingPoint\),'| availabilityNote:',JSON.stringify\(t.availabilityNote\)\);['suitableFor','notSuitableFor','whatToPrepare','included','excluded'].forEach\(k=>console.log\('  ',k,':',typeof t[k],JSON.stringify\(t[k]\)\)\);console.log\('route len:',\(t.route||[]\).length\);if\(\(t.route||[]\)[0]\)console.log\('  route[0] keys:',Object.keys\(t.route[0]\).join\(','\),'| has image:',!!t.route[0].image\);console.log\('priceOption len:',\(t.priceOption||[]\).length,JSON.stringify\(\(t.priceOption||[]\)[0]\)\);console.log\('bookingContact len:',\(t.bookingContact||[]\).length,JSON.stringify\(\(t.bookingContact||[]\)[0]\)\);console.log\('coverImage:',t.coverImage?'yes':'null','| gallery:',\(t.gallery||[]\).length\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse fail',b.slice\(0,300\)\);}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);d.data.forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.slug.slice\(0,45\),'route:',\(t.route||[]\).length\)\);const withRoute=d.data.find\(t=>\(t.route||[]\).length>0\);if\(withRoute\){console.log\('--- route-stop[0] of',withRoute.slug,'---'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(withRoute.route[0],null,1\)\);}else{console.log\('NO tour has route stops populated'\);}}\)")

Bash(cd "d:/Project/portfolio-web-fe" && rm "app/projects/[slug]/loading.tsx" "app/articles/[slug]/loading.tsx" "app/tours/[slug]/loading.tsx" && echo "removed 3 detail loading.tsx files" && ls app/*/loading.tsx app/*/*/loading.tsx 2>/dev/null)

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const [b,h]=s.split\('HTTP:'\);console.log\('HTTP',h.trim\(\)\);try{const d=JSON.parse\(b\);if\(d.error\){console.log\('ERR',d.error.status,d.error.message\);return;}console.log\('total:',d.meta?.pagination?.total\);const x=d.data[0];if\(x\){console.log\('keys:',Object.keys\(x\).join\(', '\)\);console.log\('sample:',JSON.stringify\(x,null,1\).slice\(0,700\)\);}else{console.log\('no messages returned \(empty or all filtered\)'\);}}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse fail',b.slice\(0,300\)\);}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',function\(d\){s+=d}\).on\('end',function\(\){var d=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\('hidden rows via public API:',d.meta.pagination.total,'\(0 expected if draftAndPublish keeps them unpublished\)'\);}\)")
